runTitle: Vercel Production Targeted QA - v8.12.90 Pre-Auth System Preload Fix
coveredSurfaces: v8.12.90 release commit and tag were pushed to GitLab canonical main
Vercel production deployment dpl_J1PEim6zfHjgGUoB9NcYqgEH2hVj was Ready for alias https://openmanager-ai.vercel.app
Production /api/version returned v8.12.90, release tag v8.12.90, commit 36b29a5ca3d7e2505312cee873c6c7653c00e9c6, and GitLab pipeline 2577188591
Production smoke passed for GET /, GET /login, and GET /api/version with expected v8.12.90 commit metadata
Playwright MCP pre-auth landing check cleared cookies/storage before navigation and rendered the logged-out landing state
Playwright MCP pre-auth landing console messages were 0
Playwright MCP pre-auth landing observed no /api/system requests
Playwright MCP observed the new public HEAD /api/health?service=ai&soft=true preload path instead of the auth-protected /api/system path
Vercel usage check passed with effective 1.9358 USD and billed 0.0000 USD
Cloud Run ai-engine was unchanged on ai-engine-00592-47p with cpu=1, memory=512Mi, maxScale=1, and 100% traffic
skippedSurfaces: Full broad route matrix was not rerun because the release fixed a targeted pre-auth landing preload path
Guest login and AI chat were not repeated because v8.12.90 did not change auth login, dashboard telemetry, AI routing, or AI Engine behavior
AI Engine post-deploy QA was not repeated because deploy_ai_engine was skipped for no cloud-run/ai-engine changes and /api/health confirmed the existing ai-engine version remained healthy

expertAssessments.rationale: The GitLab tag deploy reached Vercel production, version metadata matches the release commit, Vercel usage remains billed 0, and Cloud Run limits remained unchanged.
The targeted regression was verified with unit coverage, production smoke, and Playwright MCP pre-auth console/network inspection.
The pre-auth landing now exposes no console messages, no /api/system request, and the observable preload path is the public soft health endpoint.

usageChecks.summary: Current Vercel billing period reviewed after v8.12.90 production deploy; effective 1.9358 USD, billed 0.0000 USD, chargeCount 1827.
Cloud Run ai-engine remained unchanged on ai-engine-00592-47p with cpu=1, memory=512Mi, maxScale=1, concurrency=16, and 100% traffic.

artifacts.label: v8.12.90 pre-auth system preload production evidence

completedImprovements.title: 랜딩 비로그인 상태에서 /api/system 401 콘솔 에러 제거 또는 graceful handling
completedImprovements.evidence: v8.12.90 production Playwright MCP pre-auth landing check observed 0 console messages, 0 /api/system requests, and the new HEAD /api/health?service=ai&soft=true preload path.
completedImprovements.note: Previously WONT-FIX portfolio debt; fixed because the root cause was a small public-health preloader swap with no auth weakening and no free-tier cost increase.

completedImprovements.title: v8.12.90 frontend release deployed the pre-auth system preload fix
completedImprovements.evidence: Production /api/version returned v8.12.90 and commit 36b29a5ca3d7e2505312cee873c6c7653c00e9c6; Vercel deployment dpl_J1PEim6zfHjgGUoB9NcYqgEH2hVj is Ready.

notes: The local GitLab pipeline API still returns 401 because the workstation token is expired; production /api/version exposed pipeline 2577188591 after deploy.
An earlier local smoke polling process used an incorrect expected commit SHA and was stopped; rerun with the correct release SHA passed immediately.
This release is frontend-only. AI Engine stayed at v8.12.89 because no cloud-run/ai-engine files changed.
